subject: Programming, DS & Algorithms
question: Average time complexity of Quick Sort:
explanation: Quick Sort average: O(n log n).

subject: Programming, DS & Algorithms
question: Best case of Quick Sort:
explanation: Best case: O(n log n).

subject: Programming, DS & Algorithms
question: Worst case of Quick Sort:
explanation: Worst case: O(n²).

subject: Programming, DS & Algorithms
question: Space complexity of Quick Sort:
explanation: Space: O(log n).

subject: Programming, DS & Algorithms
question: Quick Sort is stable:
explanation: Not stable — equal elements maintain relative order may not be preserved.

subject: Programming, DS & Algorithms
question: Quick Sort is in-place:
explanation: In-place: only O(1) extra memory.
